theme: Intelligence layer — 3 deepening skills + orchestrator + cross-synthesis sub-skill
summary: Operator escape-hatch from snapshot Step 7: trust the synthesis, jump to a deeper analytical layer. Three standalone producer skills + one orchestrator + one read-only sub-skill, all consuming three codified analytical frameworks. Delivered in single multi-phase build session via parallelized sub-agents (~50 min wall-clock). Phase A — codified frameworks (voc-coding, vom-mining, market-deepdive) consumed as analytical vocabulary, never as section headers (form-fill ban). Phase B — three skills: mine-voc (VoC mining, Step 0 first-party data ask, scrape, 4-lens coding, JSONL corpus + routed mutations), mine-vom (VoM mining, competitor integrity check, niche-locked source crawl, external_intelligence[] cap 5-7), study-niche-marketdeepdive (30-60 min strategic deep-dive, mandatory ticket, 12 steps, memo 4-6 pages with [MKT-NNN] citations). Phase C — deepen-brand-context orchestrator chains mine-voc → mine-vom → cross-deepening-signals (sub-skill that reads Layer B mutations from both runs and produces 3 mandatory cross-checks: audience candidate × market presence, vocabulary shift × current vernacular, white-space × channel signals). Phase D — snapshot-brand Step 7 close enriched with trust-and-deepen path (4-paths AskUserQuestion).

changes.reason: JTBD 3-dim, Schwartz 5 awareness stages, theme typology 7 types, pain category 6 granularities, 4-lens coding workflow, anti-patterns. 143 lines.
Vernacular extraction, sophistication signal (Schwartz applied to niche), white-space identification, selective Porter (1-2 active forces). 150 lines.
Selective Porter + selective PESTEL + Schwartz longitudinal + Crossing the Chasm + capital flow + disruption signals. Frameworks as vocabulary, never as section headers. 124 lines.

Producer Sonnet, subagent_safe. VoC mining with Step 0 first-party data ask, source scrape, 4-lens coding, two-layer output (JSONL corpus in sources/voc/ + routed mutations to spec.json verbatim_quotes[] and profile.json voice.key_expressions[]). 4 --focus modes. 330 lines.
Producer Sonnet, subagent_safe. VoM mining with competitor integrity check, niche definition lock, source crawl, 4-lens coding. external_intelligence[] cap 5-7. 4 --focus modes. 7d cache. 290 lines.

Orchestrator Sonnet, subagent_safe. Long-running 30-60 min strategic deep-dive. Mandatory ticket lifecycle. 12 steps. Memo 4-6 pages (3000 word cap) in custom/market-memo/{date}.md, every claim cited [MKT-NNN]. 4 --focus modes. 6-9 month re-run cadence. 430 lines.

Orchestrator Sonnet, subagent_safe: false. Chains mine-voc → mine-vom → cross-deepening-signals. study-niche-marketdeepdive NEVER chained (cost asymmetry). Step 0 AskUserQuestion 4 paths. --focus pass-through. 199 lines.

Sub-skill Sonnet, subagent_safe: true, operator_facing: false. Read-only. Reads Layer B mutations from VoC + VoM runs. 3 mandatory cross-checks. Output: 3-movement synthesis paragraph + JSON return contract. Emits coherence_check event. 167 lines.
Step 7 close enriched: default close (validate-or-correct) + trust-and-deepen close (4 paths AskUserQuestion to mine-voc / mine-vom / deepen-brand-context, study-niche-marketdeepdive on-demand only).
Regenerated. 36 skills total. 5 new entries validated.

operator_impact: After snapshot Step 7 synthesis, four paths instead of two. Trust path opens deeper analytical work. Three depths: VoC alone (~15 min), VoM alone (~25 min), full deepening chain with cross-synthesis (~45 min). Strategic memo on niche standalone on direct ask only. The cross-synthesis layer detects validations / contradictions / complementarities between customer voice and market voice — one strategic read instead of three reports.
tested_on: Manifest validation (36 skills, 5 new entries parsed correctly at this point — trigger format issue surfaces in v2.9.1)
phantom-stress sync — live test deferred to v2.9.1+
